title: S + V + to V（不定詞作受詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞＋想要/希望/計劃/決定/期望＋不定詞
主詞＋希望/拒絕/同意/承諾/提供＋不定詞

explanation: 此句型用於表達主詞的意願、計畫或期望。動詞（want, hope, plan, decide, expect等）後接不定詞作受詞，表示尚未實現的行動。不定詞前的to不能省略。這些動詞都是「控制動詞」，主詞通常是執行不定詞後動作的人。常用於表述目標、願望或決策，是英文中表達主觀意向的重要句型，須注意某些動詞的特定搭配規則。

examples.eng: I hope to travel around Europe next summer vacation.
examples.chi: 我希望在明年暑假環遊歐洲。

examples.eng: She decided to study medicine at National Taiwan University.
examples.chi: 她決定在臺灣大學念醫學系。

examples.eng: My parents expect me to score well on the college entrance exam.
examples.chi: 我的父母期望我在大學入學考試中取得高分。

examples.eng: He promised to help me finish this project before Friday.
examples.chi: 他承諾在星期五前幫我完成這個項目。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵：看主詞是否能執行不定詞後的動作。want/hope/plan表述計畫性，decide表達決策點，expect表達預期與要求。注意refuse和agree的使用時機：refuse表拒絕，agree表同意。某些動詞如manage強調克服困難才成功。

examples.test: I want to become a teacher. vs. I want you to become a teacher.
examples.result: → 第一句主詞I執行become動作；第二句主詞I想要you執行become動作（需用want + 受詞 + to V的複雜結構）。本句型僅指主詞自身執行的動作。

examples.test: He refused to sign the contract. vs. He refused signing the contract.
examples.result: → refused to sign是標準用法；refusing（動名詞）用於refuse後較不常見。本句型動詞後必須用不定詞to V。

examples.test: She hopes to pass the exam. vs. She hopes passing the exam.
examples.result: → hopes to pass正確；hopes passing錯誤。hope只接不定詞，不接動名詞。

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「意願計畫來不定，主詞自己做動作；want, hope, plan, decide, expect是常客。」

parts: become a successful engineer in the future.
exercises.sentence: My brother wants to become a successful engineer in the future.
exercises.translation: 我哥哥希望將來能成為一位成功的工程師。

parts: new policies to protect the environment.
exercises.sentence: The government decided to implement new policies to protect the environment.
exercises.translation: 政府決定實施新政策以保護環境。

parts: attend the meeting on time tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: She promised to attend the meeting on time tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 她承諾明天準時參加會議。

exercises.sentence: Our teachers expect us to study hard for the final exams.
exercises.translation: 我們的老師期望我們為期末考而努力讀書。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的不定詞句型，表達希望做某事
mc_exercises.question_eng: My parents _______ me to become a doctor, but I prefer to be an engineer.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 D (expect)。expect to V 表示期望某人做某事，主詞通常期望他人執行該動作。A (want) 亦可使用但此句脈絡用 expect 更貼切。B (wish) 後應接受詞子句或省略 to 的動詞。C (hope) 通常不直接搭配人名作主詞期望他人行動。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇適當的控制動詞，表達同意或承諾
mc_exercises.question_eng: After the meeting, he _______ to submit the report by Friday without any hesitation.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (promised)。promise to V 表示承諾做某事，符合「沒有猶豫地承諾」的語境。B (wished) 後接不定詞時多指願望但無實現可能。C (hoped) 表希望但不夠強烈。D (refused) 意思相反，表拒絕。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨析相似控制動詞，選擇最適當的選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: The company _______ to invest in renewable energy projects, even though it requires significant capital expenditure.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (decided)。decide to V 表示做出決定採取行動，符合「儘管需要大量資本支出，公司仍決定投資」的語義。A (refused) 意思相反。B (agreed) 通常需要對象（agree with/to somebody）。D (wished) 表願望，不夠確定。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在複雜句型中正確使用不定詞受詞，表達期望與現實的對比
mc_exercises.question_eng: Although she had planned _______ abroad for further studies, financial constraints forced her to _______ that dream and work immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (to study; give up)。plan to V 為控制動詞搭配不定詞，第一空應為 to study。force sb. to V 中第二空亦需不定詞 to give up。A 中 abandon 後應接名詞或動名詞，非不定詞。B、D 中 plan 後接動名詞形式錯誤。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我希望在大學入學考試中取得好成績。
translation_exercises.answer: I hope to get good grades in the university entrance exam.
hints: 句型：S + hope + to V，表達未來的願望
注意：不能寫『hope that I will get』，要用不定詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她計畫在暑假期間去歐洲旅遊，並改善她的英文能力。
translation_exercises.answer: She plans to travel to Europe during summer vacation and improve her English ability.
key_points: and + to V 並列結構
hints: 句型：S + plan + to V，表示已計畫好的行動；多個不定詞可用 and 連接
注意：『plan to + V』是固定搭配，不能用『plan on + V-ing』的形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 經過深思熟慮，他決定放棄這份工作機會，以便專注於學業。
translation_exercises.answer: After careful consideration, he decided to give up the job opportunity in order to focus on his studies.
hints: 句型：S + decide + to V，表示經過思考做出的決定；『in order to』可用來表達目的
注意：『give up』是片語動詞，後接名詞；『focus on』後接名詞或動名詞，但前面用『to focus on』時，to 屬於不定詞，不是介詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他們希望通過參加志願服務來回饋社會，並承諾每個月至少投入兩小時的時間。
translation_exercises.answer: They hope to give back to society by volunteering and promise to contribute at least two hours per month.
hints: 句型：可同時使用多個『S + V + to V』結構（hope to...and promise to...）；『by + V-ing』表示實現目標的方式
注意：『by volunteering』中的 volunteering 是動名詞作介詞 by 的受詞，而不是不定詞；『promise to V』同樣遵循本句型
